steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice best emphasizes a difference between the two works. The most salient difference in the notes is material: 'Above and Below' uses aluminum tubing while 'Silver Upper White River' uses recycled silver. The correct choice must use explicit contrast language to highlight this.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Maya Lin is known for her memorials and installation art, such as Above and Below and Silver Upper White River.: mentions both materials but uses no contrast signal, so no difference is emphasized. ✗
  • Choice B — Maya Lin's Above and Below is composed of aluminum tubing; Silver Upper White River, by contrast, is composed of recycled silver.: explicit contrast language directly emphasizes the material difference between the two works. ✓
  • Choice C — The sprawling size of Maya Lin's Vietnam Veterans Memorial is echoed in Above and Below, a work made of aluminum tubing that fills an entire gallery ceiling.: shifts focus to a third work rather than comparing the two works in question. ✗
  • Choice D — After completing the Vietnam Veterans Memorial, Maya Lin completed Above and Below, another large-scale work.: cannot emphasize a difference between two works if only one is discussed. ✗
That is the correct answer.
